imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Square PWA app icon featuring a split dual-tiger composition: glowing neon blue ice tiger on the left half and blazing red-orange fire tiger on the right half, dramatic dark background with intense neon glow lighting (app-icon-512.dim_512x512.png)
- Square PWA app icon featuring a split dual-tiger composition: glowing neon blue ice tiger on the left half and blazing red-orange fire tiger on the right half, dramatic dark background with intense neon glow lighting (app-icon-192.dim_192x192.png)

existing_features.title: Generate new PWA app icons (192×192 and 512×512) inspired by the uploaded image: a dramatic split fire-and-ice dual tiger design with a dark background — a glowing blue ice tiger on the left and a blazing red/orange fire tiger on the right, facing outward. The icon should be rendered as a square icon suitable for PWA use.
